_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Make use of compiler attributes and platform-specific features.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in deploying, configuring, and scaling data platform components using infrastructure-as-code with version control and automated testing.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-013 (AI, cosine: 0.445), AI-T-006 (AI, cosine: 0.407).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.540). Shared vocabulary: [platform]. DCWF-only terms [attributes, compiler, features, make, specific, use] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, code, components, configuring, control, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.890, R=0.856). P exceeds R by 0.034 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Make use of compiler attributes and platform-specific features." and "Skill in deploying, configuring, and scaling data platform components using infr" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.466 < STS 0.540 (gap -0.074). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [attributes, compiler, features] and [automated, code, components] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.0%. Shared tokens: [platform]. DCWF-only: [attributes, compiler, features, make, specific, use]. WIDAI-only: [automated, code, components, configuring, control, data].
